summary: Surah An-Nisa outlines social justice, rights, and responsibilities in family, inheritance, marriage, and society. It emphasizes the protection of orphans and women, fair treatment in wealth and relationships, and the importance of justice and mercy. The Surah addresses laws related to inheritance, marriage, divorce, and punishment, promotes compassion, and forbids oppression. It also covers issues of faith, hypocrisy, and the responsibilities of believers toward one another, encouraging unity, obedience to Allah and His Messenger, and steadfastness in adversity.
